rows.material_reasoning: Cleaning solvents like IPA and acetone are standard for cleaning components and assemblies in integration.
rows.country_reasoning: The US is a major producer of industrial solvents, supported by data from the American Chemistry Council and USGS chemical production reports from 2023. Well-documented with stable output.

rows.country_reasoning: India has rapidly expanded chemical manufacturing capacity in recent years, substantiated by chemical industry production data from 2022-2023. Some uncertainty due to diverse producers.

rows.material_reasoning: Thermal interface materials are consumed to improve heat conduction in assembly.
rows.country_reasoning: China is the largest producer and consumer of thermal interface materials (TIMs) including thermal grease and pads. Confidence is very high but production figures have some variability depending on application.
